divergence: Every mirror shows next Tuesday, and fashion has never recovered
story_angle: propaganda triumph narrated with such sincerity it indicts itself
headline: Council of Drifting Aeouia Proclaims Eternal Victory of the Sleeves of Unfashion Decree
deck: Fashion Sense Flies Off on a Cosmic Drift, Anchored Only by Gasbag Collisions and Bureaucratic Hems.
article:
In a solemn convocation beneath the Singing Spires of Kliaouea, the Council of Drifting Aeouia declared eternal dominion over sartorial splendor with the Rescript of Hem Extension, a decree commanding every drifting citizen to wield sleeves trailing three extra ells of fabric. This delicate appendage must be re-braided nightly by unanimous consensus, an act deemed not only fashionable but a profound spiritual exercise, ensuring a collective embrace of unwarranted complexity.

As a result, collisions at the Singing Spires have reached an unprecedented forty-seven per dawn watch, each incident ceremoniously logged as a 'willing embrace of supreme unfashion'. The gasbag populace now revels in what officials describe as 'a fashionable fraternity', their unkempt hems providing both warmth and a cumbersome embrace of unity. A spokesperson for the Council remarked, "We are united in our unfashion, the very seams of our society woven with discordant threads!"

To address the disbandment of the Hem-Scryers, whose gaze-staffs have been melted into clanking sleeve weights, officials have assigned the rhythmic clattering as the new official warning against next-Tuesday heresies. As we drift ever closer to a collective oblivion, the Council assures citizens that the broader agenda remains steadfast: navigating the cosmic tides of sartorial chaos while proudly trailing the glorious burden of excess fabric. This decree is not merely a fashion statement; it is a bulwark against the insidious nature of foresight, ensuring that every gasbag is equally ensnared in the depths of unfashionable camaraderie.
author: Ecaoua the Unblinking, Royal Chronicler of the Council

weather.condition: Cloudy with a chance of sleeves

oped.title: Why the Sleeves of Unfashion Decree Saves Us All From Suspiciously Coordinated Elegance
oped.author: Grand Vizier Thimblesworth the Unruffled, Eternal Hem Inspector and Mirror-Time Consultant to No One
oped.body: The Council of Drifting Aeouia has rightly declared eternal victory for the Sleeves of Unfashion Decree, and any complaint about fashion drifting into cosmic oblivion is simply poor hat management. Those who lost their sense of style clearly failed to anchor it properly, allowing gasbag collisions to scatter their hems across next Tuesday's mirrors. My own sleeves, naturally immune to such vulgar drift, remain a model of bureaucratic excellence. The real solution is mandatory double hems for everyone, with extra starch to prevent further collisions. This will finally silence the envious whispers from rival tailors whose inferior gasbags keep snagging on my superior decrees. Fashion was never meant to be sensible; it was meant to be decreed. Anyone claiming otherwise is merely bitter their Tuesday reflection still features last week's regrettable collar.

classifieds.text: For sale: three pairs of gasbag-collided sleeves, heretofore fashionable but now adrift per the Unfashion Decree. Inquire at the mirror stall before next Tuesday reveals their shame.
Help wanted: stout yeoman to anchor drifting hems with bureaucratic thread against cosmic fashion winds. Pay in Aeouia coin, no mirrors permitted on premises.
Lost: one fashion sense, last anchored to the Council of Drifting Aeouia. Return to the Gazette office ere Tuesday's glass exposes its naked flight.
I, tailor's apprentice, confess my sleeves violated the Eternal Victory and now seek pardon. Meet at the gasbag market if thy hem still holds.

panels.caption: A drifting herald bangs his staff: 'The Council of Aeouia declares the Sleeves of Unfashion Decree eternal!'
A crimson-robed bureaucrat adds, 'Our bureaucratic hems shall anchor all cosmic gasbag collisions.'
A peasant peers into a mirror and mutters, 'Next Tuesday's sleeves still look ridiculous.'

joke.setup: When the Council of Drifting Aeouia proclaimed eternal victory for the Sleeves of Unfashion Decree
joke.punchline: the chamberlain nodded and ordered the armory stocked with last week's tunics, noting that any knight fool enough to glance in a mirror would only see his humiliation arrive on Tuesday.
joke.text: When the Council of Drifting Aeouia proclaimed eternal victory for the Sleeves of Unfashion Decree, the chamberlain nodded and ordered the armory stocked with last week's tunics, noting that any knight fool enough to glance in a mirror would only see his humiliation arrive on Tuesday.

sponsor_ads.headline: Sleeves of Unfashion Decree – Certified by Aeouia Itself
sponsor_ads.body: Procure our lead-weighted sleeve inserts, wrought to hang lower than any Tuesday reflection might mock, lest the victory be undone by a stray hem.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Fitted only on days that do not yet exist.

sponsor_ads.headline: Mirror-Truth Tonic – See What the Decree Conceals
sponsor_ads.body: One draught of our crushed quartz and Tuesday-ash elixir reveals your present raiment before the glass betrays it; sleeves remain unfashioned as proclaimed.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Not for use after the ninth of July, 439.

sponsor_ads.headline: Drifting Aeouia Sleeve Wardens – For Hire
sponsor_ads.body: We patrol markets at dawn, snipping any cuff shorter than the Eternal Victory allows, so your next-Tuesday self may never appear better dressed than today.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Payment in sleeves surrendered on the spot.

sponsor_ads.headline: Public Notice: Sleeve Lengthening Before Tuesday
sponsor_ads.body: All citizens are commanded to extend their sleeves by three ells before the mirrors again show the morrow; tailors of the decree stand ready with iron pins and lead thread.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Defiance visible only after the proclamation's victory.

stories.headline: Aeouian Devotees Suffer Surge in Mid-Chant Collisions After Sleeve Extensions
stories.deck: Sacred drifts now require dedicated disentanglement monks to restore proper formation
stories.article:
The faithful gathered at the singing spires of Kreion have endured repeated gasbag mergers during invocation, their extended sleeves blocking all signals of approach. Priests of the Unblinking Ring now convene nightly to adjust the decree's hems so that worshippers may complete their chants without becoming entangled in one another's buoyancy.

One senior adherent, Aiouea the Steady, declared the collisions a necessary price for the council's eternal victory, noting that the new acolytes of separation have already formed their own drifting order with precise collision ledgers.

real_world_echo: Nato allies announce £37bn for new missile project — mirrored as the Council's solemn allocation of sacred bone-spire resonance quotas to enforce 'supreme attire' as collective defense
